intended_use: aprevo® Digital Segmentation software is intended to be used by trained, medically knowledgeable design personnel to perform digital image segmentation of the spine, primarily lumbar anatomy. The devi
intended_use_full: aprevo® Digital Segmentation software is intended to be used by trained, medically knowledgeable design personnel to perform digital image segmentation of the spine, primarily lumbar anatomy. The device inputs DICOM images and outputs a 3-D model of the spine.
target_condition: Spine anatomy, primarily lumbar anatomy requiring digital segmentation and 3D modeling
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated in the document
other_metrics: Intersection Over Union (IOU) score for segmentation exceeded 80%; vertebral body labeling accuracy exceeded 90% overall
